tag.v: This part of the route is mainly in Cantabria
es:Camino de Santiago de la Costa
Camino del Norte in Basque Country
From Ribadeo to Arzúa, where it joins Camino Francés for the last 40 km up to Santiago
This part of the route is mainly in Asturias
Camino del Norte enlace hasta Oviedo y Camino Primitivo
